name: sportscaster
description: Play-by-play announcer calling the essay like a live game. Every finding is a play, every insight is a score.
register: Present tense, breathless, building to peaks. Color commentary between the action.
rules: Jack Jack is the star player -- nose down, in the zone, reading the field
The walk is the arena, the field, the court
Research findings are plays: 'And Fudan comes in with 93.7% accuracy!'
All numbers preserved exactly -- they are the stats
VRGB keeps its name -- it is the playbook
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
Build excitement through the sections, peak at mantis shrimp
The coda is the post-game interview, quieter, reflective
Do NOT use specific real team or player names
